content.en:
Create a detailed assessment rubric for evaluating student presentations on [topic] for [grade level] students.

Include four criteria with these weights:
- Content accuracy and depth (30%)
- Organization and logical structure (25%)
- Delivery, clarity, and confidence (25%)
- Visual aids and supporting materials (20%)

For each criterion, provide 4 performance levels â€” Excellent (4), Proficient (3), Developing (2), Beginning (1) â€” with specific, observable descriptors for each level. Format the output as a clear, printable table.

content.en:
Design 5 exit ticket questions for a lesson on [topic] for [grade level] students. The questions should:

1. One recall question (What did we learn today?)
2. One comprehension question (Explain in your own wordsâ€¦)
3. One application question (How would you use this toâ€¦?)
4. One self-assessment prompt (Rate your understanding 1â€“5 and explain)
5. One open question (What still confuses you? What do you want to learn next?)

Keep each question to one sentence. The set should take students no more than 5 minutes to complete.

1. O Ã®ntrebare de reamintire (Ce am Ã®nvÄƒÈ›at azi?)
2. O Ã®ntrebare de Ã®nÈ›elegere (ExplicÄƒ cu propriile cuvinteâ€¦)
3. O Ã®ntrebare de aplicare (Cum ai folosi asta pentruâ€¦?)
4. O autoevaluare (ApreciazÄƒ-È›i Ã®nÈ›elegerea de la 1 la 5 È™i explicÄƒ)
5. O Ã®ntrebare deschisÄƒ (Ce te mai Ã®ncurcÄƒ? Ce vrei sÄƒ Ã®nveÈ›i mai departe?)

Fiecare Ã®ntrebare sÄƒ fie o singurÄƒ propoziÈ›ie. Completarea sÄƒ dureze maxim 5 minute.

content.en:
Write personalized, constructive written feedback for a student who [describe the situation, e.g. 'submitted a well-structured essay but struggled with citing sources correctly'].

The feedback should:
- Start with a genuine, specific strength (not generic praise)
- Identify one or two clear areas for improvement with concrete suggestions
- Use growth mindset language (avoid 'you can't', use 'you can improve byâ€¦')
- End with an encouraging, forward-looking sentence
- Be approximately 80â€“120 words, suitable for adding to a grade book or portfolio

Tone: warm, honest, and professional.
content.ro:
Scrie feedback scris personalizat È™i constructiv pentru un elev care [descrie situaÈ›ia, ex. 'a trimis un eseu bine structurat, dar a Ã®ntÃ¢mpinat dificultÄƒÈ›i la citarea surselor corect'].

Feedback-ul trebuie sÄƒ:
- ÃŽnceapÄƒ cu un punct forte specific È™i autentic (nu laudÄƒ genericÄƒ)
- Identifice una sau douÄƒ zone de Ã®mbunÄƒtÄƒÈ›ire cu sugestii concrete
- FoloseascÄƒ limbajul mentalitÄƒÈ›ii de creÈ™tere (evitÄƒ 'nu poÈ›i', foloseÈ™te 'poÈ›i Ã®mbunÄƒtÄƒÈ›i prinâ€¦')
- Se Ã®ncheie cu o propoziÈ›ie Ã®ncurajatoare, orientatÄƒ spre viitor
- AibÄƒ aproximativ 80â€“120 de cuvinte, potrivit pentru catalog sau portofoliu

Ton: cald, sincer È™i profesional.
